justification: Text states 'Endast vid de ängar som låg närmare än hundra meter från lampraden ökade fjärilsbesöken påtagligt; längre bort gick ingen förändring att mäta.' D matches: near lamps rose markedly, farther meadows unchanged. A reverses cause; B overstates ('mångdubblade... samtliga'); C is honeybees, unaffected.

Vikbrandt's explanation: 'En stark armatur intill ängen överröstar detta ljusband och får insekterna att cirkla planlöst kring lyktan i stället för att söka sig till blommorna.' A restates this. B/C/D (burning eyes, fear, scent) are not the stated mechanism.

Main message balances value and limits: 'en billig och nästan omärklig förändring ge nattens fjärilar en del av mörkret tillbaka' plus cautions on weather and place ('behöver inte gälla en fruktodling eller en stadspark'). C captures both; B overstates, A and D are sub-points.

Since only meadows within 100 m changed and 'längre bort gick ingen förändring att mäta', the far meadows were little affected by lighting to begin with, so had little to gain. B states this. D is the opposite inference; A (no butterflies at all) is unsupported.

Central objection: 'Det jag vänder mig mot är att vi låter ett enda mått — antalet kroppar som passerar — ersätta frågan om vad kvarteret faktiskt gör med oss.' B matches. A is explicitly denied ('i grunden bra'); C overstates; D is evidence, not the objection.

'Bland dem som uppgav att de återvänt flera gånger tycks kaféerna, inte utställningarna, ha varit det som lockade dem tillbaka.' C = cafés rather than exhibitions. D overstates ('saknade helt betydelse'); B reverses.

'Samma handgrepp — att lägga en blomma mellan sidorna — kan tjäna kunskapen lika väl som saknaden.' A matches. B is contradicted ('desto mindre säker blir jag på att gränsen håller'); C and D overstate.

Selma: 'det systemet som bestämmer ordningen'; Hedda: 'Hennes blommor ligger i den ordning hon fann dem, och under varje står ett datum och ett namn.' D = system vs place/memory. A reverses the two; B/C misstate.
Conclusion: 'what an older learner takes up may matter far less than whether they keep at it... The instrument is optional. The effort is not.' C matches. A/B/D contradict the sober framing.

'modest ones, on the order of a few percent — and... the gains were still there when the same people were tested three months later.' A matches. C is false (under three hours), B overstates ('dramatically'), D unsupported.
'when their attention scores came back, they had climbed by roughly the same margin as the cellists.' D matches exactly. A/B/C all contradict.

'What the two activities had in common was... a fixed weekly commitment, a room full of other people expecting you to show, and the slow... labor of getting better at something genuinely hard.' B matches. A is the discarded music hypothesis; C/D overstated single causes.

'It is an appealing thought, and Fanshawe may well turn out to be right. For now, though, the Merritt data... point somewhere more sober.' Reserved: appealing but evidence points elsewhere = A. B/D too committed, C too dismissive.
'treated them as a passing ___, a fad that would fold' — a passing novelty/fad. C novelty fits; casualty/austerity/loyalty do not.

'their ___ has quietly deepened. Membership schemes now run waiting lists, and publishers court the venues.' Growing appeal = popularity. B. Notoriety is negative; prosperity/familiarity do not fit 'waiting lists'.

'company has proved stubbornly ___ to the download.' Resistant to the download = D. Vulnerable/hostile/superior do not collocate with 'to the download' in this sense of surviving digital substitution.

'a café that misjudges its stock can ___ its slim margins overnight, its shelves clogged with games nobody wants.' Erode its margins = A, the standard collocation for reducing margins. Inflate is opposite; dilute/squander collocate less naturally with 'margins'.

'a certain kind of unhurried, face-to-face pleasure has turned out to be far more ___ than the analysts assumed.' Lasting = durable, B. Portable/disposable/negotiable contradict the theme of enduring appeal.

'the owls begin hunting almost precisely eleven minutes after the local bats leave their roosts... The bats... flush up dense clouds of night-flying moths, and the owls simply harvest.' C matches. D is explicitly denied ('do not chase the bats'); A/B unsupported.

'A vessel that reached the quay safely paid the keepers a fixed toll; a vessel that ran aground paid nothing at all.' Pay-for-success aligned keepers' self-interest with lit lamps = D. A is circular evidence, B/C overstated generalisations.
